summary: P2 Dark Mode Verification PASSED. Core shared components (Card, Button, Input, LoadingScreen) and Provider components (ProviderProfile, ProviderClients, ProviderDashboard) now correctly use useColors() hook for theming. AppearanceSettings is NOW visible in Doula Profile (previously missing). Dark mode working across Mom and Doula user flows.

test_results.mom_profile_appearance_settings: PASS - Appearance section visible with Use device/Light/Dark options
test_results.mom_home_dark_mode: PASS - Cards have dark surface backgrounds
test_results.doula_profile_appearance_settings: PASS - AppearanceSettings NOW visible in Doula Profile (P2 fix verified)
test_results.doula_clients_dark_mode: PASS - Client cards have dark themed backgrounds, text visible
test_results.doula_dashboard_dark_mode: PASS - Stat cards and Quick Actions have dark surface styling
test_results.card_component_theming: PASS - Card uses colors.surface from useColors()
test_results.button_component_theming: PASS - Button uses colors.primary/secondary from useColors()
test_results.input_component_theming: PASS - Input uses colors.surface/text/border from useColors()

screens_verified: Mom Profile - AppearanceSettings visible, theme toggle works
Mom Home - Cards show dark surface in dark mode
Doula Profile - AppearanceSettings NOW visible (P2 fix)
Doula Clients - Client cards themed correctly
Doula Dashboard - Stat cards and tip card themed
components_verified: Card.tsx - uses useColors() for colors.surface, colors.border, useShadows()
Button.tsx - uses useColors() for colors.primary, colors.secondary, colors.white
Input.tsx - uses useColors() for colors.surface, colors.text, colors.border, colors.textSecondary
LoadingScreen.tsx - uses useColors() for colors.background, colors.primary, colors.textSecondary
ProviderProfile.tsx - uses useColors() + includes AppearanceSettings component
ProviderClients.tsx - uses useColors() for background, surface, text colors
ProviderDashboard.tsx - uses useColors() for background, text colors
verification_details.theme_mechanism: ThemeContext CSS injection via style tag (#theme-override-styles) with !important rules

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All dark mode tests passed for Mom and Doula

context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 Dark Mode is working. Core shared components (Card, Button, Input, LoadingScreen) and Provider components (ProviderProfile, ProviderClients, ProviderDashboard) now use useColors() hook. AppearanceSettings is visible in both Mom and Doula/Midwife profiles. Note: After server restart, you may need to clear cache to see latest component changes.
